activities.name: Little Cougar loop with Expect Delays
Cool Runnings on the Slumped Slice
activities.description: Started very easy and then picked it up a little in the cool Seattle drizzle.

activities.name: Worked hard on a smooth Dayton loop
Spray Park / Carbon Glacier loop
activities.description: With [strava://athletes/385803/11]Mino Giunta! Mino was gentle on the old man… I survived pretty well up to the final few hundred feet of the climb out of the Carbon River valley, but pulled myself together for a low-speed jog into Mowich Lake in the fog

activities.name: Expect Delays weekend run
activities.description: With Tam, Lauren, Mintu, Anita, Melanie, and Tom. Coffee with Nick, Chris, Evan, and Rollie!

activities.name: Summer slowdown bottoms out?
activities.description: Every year I run better in winter than in summer. This morning was cooler but not yet crisp. Hoping to take a minute off this course in the fall and maybe another in winter, like I did last year. Running-gods willing!

activities.name: Showing Adam Fairy Canyon
activities.description: First run together in years. Totally fun

activities.name: Helping Adam PR the lake before a sunset dinner at Rays
Phinney on a perfectly cool morning
activities.description: Smoothly, but with high heart rate

activities.name: Keeping it tangled in Bridle Trails
Reverse Dayton in the Drizzle with Lauren
Soggy W Tiger 3 with Jay, Ann, and Rachel
activities.description: Full Fall. Raining hard with strong winds at the top. Oh joy.

activities.name: Murakami run
activities.description: Sticking to his 10 min/mile pace.  Next step is to do a Murakami week: 6 days of 6 miles at this pace

activities.name: Snake2lake scouting #1: exploring East Squak
activities.description: Glorious morning in and above the fog with Monica

activities.name: Snake2lake scouting #2
activities.description: Attempting to find a place for an aid station between Rattlesnake and Tiger. Expected location was a big road-works site. With Monica. NO GO! Couldn’t get to the trail for all the blackberry

activities.name: Snake2lake scouting #3: Aid station, creek crossing, road works crossing
activities.description: 1 mile from a parking lot is where the aid station will be (where this run turned); then down to the creek (slow but quite easy); wet foot creek crossing ( not too cold); the we got escorted across the road works by Kevin, the very helpful environmental engineer on the site. All good.

activities.name: In praise of short runs
activities.description: When you finish wanting more, you erroneously think you could run forever. It's a good feeling.
